page: lessons/04-the-menu/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Find verses about courage when you're afraid.

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

function.name: search_by_meaning
function.description: Search the Bible by meaning rather than exact words. Use this when the user describes a theme, feeling, or idea — like 'verses about courage' — instead of naming a verse. Returns the closest verses with a similarity score.

query.description: What the user is looking for, in plain words

function.name: places_for_passage
function.description: List the places named in a Bible passage. Use this when the user asks where something happened. Takes a verse reference like 'Acts 9:3'.

arguments.query: verses about courage when you're afraid

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Find verses about courage when you're afraid.

arguments.query: verses about courage when you're afraid

messages.content:
Closest matches (KJV text):
Isaiah 35:4 (similarity 0.9051): Say to them [that are] of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not: behold, your God will come [with] vengeance, [even] God [with] a recompence; he will come and save you.
Psalms 31:24 (similarity 0.8981): Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the LORD.
Haggai 2:5 (similarity 0.8919): [According to] the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you: fear ye not.
Psalms 119:74 (similarity 0.8875): They that fear thee will be glad when they see me; because I have hoped in thy word.
Psalms 71:7 (similarity 0.8857): I am as a wonder unto many; but thou [art] my strong refuge.

message.content:
Here are some of the closest verses about having courage when you're afraid, according to the search results:

**Isaiah 35:4 (KJV)**
> "Say to them that are of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not: behold, your God will come with vengeance, even God with a recompence; he will come and save you."

**Psalms 31:24 (KJV)**
> "Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the LORD."

**Haggai 2:5 (KJV)**
> "[According to] the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you: fear ye not."

response.query: verses about courage when you're afraid

results.text: Say to them [that are] of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not: behold, your God will come [with] vengeance, [even] God [with] a recompence; he will come and save you.
Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the LORD.
[According to] the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you: fear ye not.
They that fear thee will be glad when they see me; because I have hoped in thy word.
I am as a wonder unto many; but thou [art] my strong refuge.

**Haggai 2:5 (KJV)**
